business_type: Local dental clinic — general dentistry and patient care
weekly_tasks_text: Answer new patient calls and WhatsApp messages; schedule appointments and reschedule cancellations; send appointment reminders 24 hours before visits; follow up with patients after treatments; prepare treatment plans and price estimates; track unpaid invoices and insurance paperwork; order dental supplies and manage inventory; post 1-2 social media updates per week; review Google reviews and respond to patient feedback; coordinate staff shifts and vacation requests.
current_tools_text: Google Calendar, WhatsApp Business, Gmail, Excel for tracking, dedicated clinic management software, Google Business Profile, Facebook and Instagram for posts.
top_time_sinks_text: Repeated WhatsApp questions from patients; manual appointment reminders; rescheduling missed or canceled appointments; following up on unpaid bills; writing similar treatment explanations again and again.
error_sensitive_areas_text: Patient medical information; appointment dates and treatment details; billing and insurance details; medication or post-treatment instructions; consent forms.
customer_facing_areas_text: Phone calls with patients; WhatsApp messages; appointment reminders; post-treatment follow-ups; Google reviews replies; treatment plan explanations.
primary_goal_text: Reduce admin load and missed follow-ups without making patient communication feel robotic.
things_owner_refuses_to_automate_text: Final medical advice; sensitive patient complaints; treatment recommendations; pricing negotiations for major treatments.
